---
title: "\'The Angel of Viareggio: A Tale of Child-Life in Italy\'"
---

## \'The Angel of Viareggio: A Tale of Child-Life in Italy\'

**Author:** Linda Villari
**Date:** 1880
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (January-July 1880)

### Notes

Not separately published under this title.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
